channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Kalshi bans 3 US politicians for betting on their own election races
item.description: Matt Klein, a sitting member of the Minnesota State Senate, said he made a bet out of curiosity, while Mark Moran claimed he wanted to see how Kalshi responds to insider trading activity.

item.title: Let's make crypto affordable in the US again. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE84VHNTUlRPUW4wWkFuSWlTdXVrVl82OG9YTGhNQ1llaUQ3c2dFdEwzMTBubllUR3lCOWRGc1E1Zy01R09XX2xZam5HWVBMTmlkQzB1TlZiZHVSMEJUa3ljNw?oc=5" target="_blank">Let's make crypto affordable in the …

item.title: New York, Illinois sign EO banning state employees from prediction markets
item.description: New York Governor Kathy Hochul criticized the Trump administration for not implementing any “meaningful ethical standards” to curb insider trading in prediction markets.

item.title: LONGITUDE recap: Adam Back on Satoshi, crypto regulation needs tweaks
item.description: Blockstream’s Adam Back discusses why people think he’s Satoshi Nakamoto, while the CEO of OKX Europe said MiCA is “extremely beneficial” for the industry at the latest LONGITUDE event in Paris.

item.title: Four reasons why the crypto market is rallying today: Will bulls maintain control?
item.description: Bitcoin and Ether surged as US liquidity measures and record spot ETF inflows offset investors’ recession fears and their concerns over the war in Iran.

item.title: Bitcoin chases monthly high above $80K as nearly all BTC price metrics turn bullish
item.description: Bitcoin moves closer to $80,000 as data shows traders positioning in futures markets. Will potential profit-taking in the $83,000 to $88,000 range put a cap on the rally?

item.title: Price predictions 4/22: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, XMR
item.description: Bitcoin rally above the $78,333 resistance signals sustained buying by the bulls, clearing the path for a potential rally to $84,000.

item.title: The President of the United States told me to buy crypto. I did not ask questions. Questions are for people who do not trust the President. I sold the truck the same afternoon. I have sent the phrase "few understand" to 1,400 people since then. Eleven bought in. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE43akFPTThPQTJTNXl5Y0J0Qm1SSUstR3pkcXlrSzQtbWJITHYtVGhUVUFkNXVWQjhQTU42SHA4Zm1XTW5pbnFoZ3dOZUE3THc2UGZWWDZZa1VPLUpVNGc?oc=5" target="_blank">The President of the United States told…

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried pulls motion for a new trial, still asks for new judge
item.description: The ex-FTX CEO said he consulted with his parents and lawyers regarding a recent filing he sent from prison, but claimed to be the ”ultimate author of the documents.”

item.title: US Government Runs a Bitcoin Node, But Not Mining BTC: US Admiral
item.description: The commander of U.S. forces in the Pacific said the military is investigating Bitcoin’s ability to “secure and protect networks.”

item.title: OpenAI Launches Workspace Agents Feature in ChatGPT
item.description: Codex-powered tools automate reports, code, Slack replies, and other workplace tasks.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Kalshi flags more insider trading cases, including politician who appeared on FBoy Island
item.description: The prediction market platform, which has been caught in the middle of a regulatory battle between the feds and the states, is seeking to demonstrate strong controls.

item.title: PUSD stablecoin deploys on ADI Chain, targeting $3T Islamic finance market
item.description: The Shariah-compliant stablecoin backed by Gulf currencies expands to a new Layer 2 network aimed at institutional settlement in the Middle East.

item.title: Kalshi Fines Meme Coin Candidate Mark Moran, Others for Betting on Their Own Elections
item.description: Moran, a candidate running for U.S. Senate in Virginia, previously described self-wagers as “free advertising.”

item.title: Xiaomi's New MiMo 2.5 Pro AI Can See, Hear, and Act—All in One Model
item.description: Five weeks after MiMo-V2-Pro stunned the AI world, Xiaomi is back with a model that adds eyes and ears—at half the price.

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla reports unchanged bitcoin holdings, books $173 million digital asset loss
item.description: The company's bitcoin stash remained at 11,509 BTC, worth about $880 million at bitcoin's current price of around $78,000.

item.title: AngelList's USVC Gives Investors Exposure to OpenAI, Anthropic and xAI—Starting at $500
item.description: AngelList's new USVC fund allows non-accredited retail investors to gain exposure to major private firms like Anthropic and OpenAI.

item.title: Banking group asks for more time to comment on US stablecoin bill
item.description: The letter to four US government agencies said banks needed 60 more days for comment after OCC stablecoin rulemaking had been finalized.

item.title: Trump-linked American Bitcoin energizes 11,298 new ASICs
item.description: American Bitcoin (ABTC) originally purchased the mining rigs in March, weeks after reporting a $59 million loss for Q4 2025.

item.title: JUST IN: Tesla $TSLA reveals none of its $900,000,000 Bitcoin was sold in Q1 2026. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1RNkc4ck1GSlRzSVpiTko0akhILTJ3dUliN1JiWWc0elljU25oZGkyeEhTOFFXa19KeGhNYV9YSGRGdVp1ZEZUZjJrQjltc1VHeF90dWdDYVEyYTdLWnI2Ykh3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Tesla $TSLA reveals none …

item.title: New York, Illinois Ban Government Employees From Insider Trading on Prediction Markets
item.description: The states banned government employees from trading on insider information—a growing concern as prediction markets related to politics surge in popularity.

item.title: Pope’s Anti-AI Warnings May Be AI-Written, Detection Tool Claims
item.description: AI Detector Developer Pangram Labs’ browser extension tagged several posts from the Pope’s X account.

item.title: Google Will Spend Up to $185 Billion This Year to Power AI 'Agentic Era': CEO
item.description: Google will invest up to $185 billion this year to build the infrastructure behind autonomous AI agents, CEO Sundar Pichai said Wednesday.

item.title: The question isn't whether privacy. It's what sort of privacy
item.description: Blockchains are going private. The only question left is what kind of privacy the industry will build, argues Schiller.

item.title: UK’s Financial Conduct Authority Leads London Crackdown on Crypto Traders
item.description: Multi-agency raid marks shift from warnings to physical enforcement as UK regulator finds zero legally registered P2P crypto traders.

item.title: Justin Sun Alleges Trump's World Liberty Threatened to Burn His WLFI Tokens
item.description: An investment in President Trump's meme coin allegedly upset members of World Liberty Financial’s team, the lawsuit claims.

item.title: Thailand regulator mulls crypto futures expansion in licensing overhaul
item.description: Thailand’s SEC is seeking feedback on rule changes that would let digital asset firms offer derivatives within existing entities, lowering barriers to market entry.

item.title: Kraken calls for de minimis exemption on crypto taxes after 2025 reports
item.description: The crypto exchange advocated for two key changes to US tax law affecting crypto users to “eliminate millions of unnecessary forms.”

item.title: Pyth Network to determine outcomes in Kalshi’s commodities expansion
item.description: The prediction platform will use Pyth’s pricing data to settle trades on its new commodities markets, as it expands into assets like oil, gold and crops.

item.title: OpenAI Just Open-Sourced a Tool That Scrubs Your Secrets Before ChatGPT Ever Sees Them
item.description: OpenAI has released a small, free model that strips names, addresses, passwords, and account numbers out of any text, right on your laptop, before you paste it into an AI chatbot.

item.title: Keel, Hive Shares Jump as Companies Continue Shift From Bitcoin Mining to AI
item.description: Hive raised $115 million while Keel (formerly Bitfarms) sold off a mining facility as both Bitcoin miners embrace the AI boom.

item.title: Robinhood Venture Fund's $75M stake in OpenAI aims to enable retail investments
item.description: The private equity investment will be used to give retail customers indirect price exposure to OpenAI through venture tokens.

item.title: SpaceX Warns Investors Elon Musk’s Space-Based AI Data Centers May Not Pay Off
item.description: SpaceX’s IPO filing says orbital AI computing remains unproven and commercially uncertain despite Musk’s public push for space as AI’s next frontier.

item.title: 'Axie Infinity' Gaming Network Ronin Sets Date for Ethereum Layer-2 Migration
item.description: The Ronin gaming network will slash RON token inflation from over 20% to less than 1% while introducing automated developer rewards.

item.title: Banks seek to slow down implementation of crypto's GENIUS Act on stablecoin oversight
item.description: U.S. banking groups argued that a number of federal agencies are moving quickly on stablecoin regulations, making it hard to understand how rules will interact.

item.title: The Protocol: Kelp DAO exploited for $292 million
item.description: Also: DPRK hacking crypto, Aave contagion and Coinbase on quantum computing.

item.title: Ethereum risks 10% decline versus Bitcoin despite record ETH staking
item.description: Ethereum’s record 32.33% staking ratio is shrinking liquid supply, reducing sell pressure and potentially supporting an ETH price recovery over time.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: Protecting the people building DeFi infrastructure
item.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Jennifer Rosenthal writes on the need to protect the people actually building DeFi infrastructure. Then, Alexis Sirkia comments on how Ethereum's L2 strategy is failing due to a fundamental de…

item.title: The $292 million Kelp DAO exploit shows why crypto bridges are still one of the industry's weakest links
item.description: The problem is structural and as long as bridges depend on complex systems with shared infrastructure and hidden trust assumptions, they will remain vulnerable.

item.title: Trump-linked American Bitcoin shares spike over 12% after announcing more mining power
item.description: The Trump family-linked mining and treasury company announced 11,298 additional bitcoin mining ASICs at its Drumheller site.

item.title: GSR Launches Actively Managed Bitcoin, Ethereum and Solana Basket ETF on Nasdaq
item.description: Crypto market maker GSR has launched an actively managed ETF on the Nasdaq that includes Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana.

item.title: BREAKING: Crypto funds attracted +$1.4 billion in inflows last week, the highest weekly inflow since the 3rd week of January. This marks the 7th weekly inflow out of the last 8, the strongest streak since October. Bitcoin funds led with +$1.1 billion, bringing year - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9BQTdILVFtanhncnJZemJqdi1EN1ZUU1ZfNGp3dGdKLXRRc3AxWnZNc0xuRmFQbmNCM2V6WXdncHlyWUNzeHZYSnRRNGo4SGZBV0NzZWI3Wm83c0xhR3BVTXpET0RHQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Crypto funds attra…

item.title: Bitcoin breaks Strategy's STRC ex-dividend date slump for the first time in six months
item.description: Bitcoin is seeing a short squeeze dynamic and steady U.S. demand to support gains.

item.title: Bitcoin tops $79,000 as crypto rally gathers steam; Circle, Coinbase, Strategy lead
item.description: BTC pushed to an 11-week high with dynamics for a short squeeze building, one analyst noted.

item.title: Russia Advances Sweeping Crypto Bill With Provisions for 'Circumventing Sanctions'
item.description: The legislation would license crypto exchanges and permit cross-border cryptocurrency use while maintaining domestic payment restrictions.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇷🇺 Russia advances bill to regulate & classify crypto as property and allow it in foreign trade. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1nTjJOMVdsVFNoVkQxbUUxU0JQWmR4ODhVbDZubzVCVDE4VGVscWhacUVLVzdZTFYwd1hyXzc5UFlzYVl5RjVaOTNCTTh0UjFCVlJoRUZWblhZX0NJellURm9R?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇷🇺 Russia advances bill…

item.title: Viral Meme on X Recalls Crypto Traders Cobie and Gainzy T... - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE5ldnl5dWN6OVNxMndGNjRza0VKUFdiSFFTbDNyX0lidUhFeW00c1dNVEVJN1lNRTVDakxhaUF1RTRGN2FDOU84OEtGbmhDYkQ5ZW9MMjBYUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Viral Meme on X Recalls Crypto Traders Cobie and…

item.title: The London P2P sweep: UK FCA raids eight illegal peer-to-peer trading hubs
item.description: The sites were targeted for facilitating P2P trading without required registration or anti-money laundering controls, posing a financial crime risk.

item.title: Crypto giant GSR launches its first ETF to give investors an easy way to bet on the big 3 tokens
item.description: GSR is entering the asset management space with a new Nasdaq-listed ETF that actively manages a basket of bitcoin, ether and solana while offering investors a chance to earn staking yields.

item.title: American Bitcoin Shares Spike After Trump-Backed Firm Activates 11K BTC Miners
item.description: Publicly-traded miner American Bitcoin expands its owned hash rate, with its share price continuing to climb after hitting a low in March.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin surges above $79,000 for the first time since February 3rd. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1VTldIZGdiSTZMQXBBR2ZoRFhyVWRra09HU3BoQ1VNb04yVXNkOVBzc21Bcm9lc3drUGZCNTJ1QmE2NDhiRnBwLVUydEotQVdEeDRhQ3FoSE9oUjJ1NWJhaFA0RkZSQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin surges abo…

item.title: Lazarus-linked macOS malware hits crypto and fintech firms
item.description: Security researchers linked a new “Mach-O Man” malware kit to a Lazarus campaign that uses fake meeting invites and ClickFix prompts to steal credentials and access corporate systems on macOS.

item.title: HIVE, Keel push deeper into AI data centers with capital raise, asset sale
item.description: HIVE raises $115M to expand data centers while Keel exits Latin America, redirecting funds into HPC and AI as both stocks climb 4%.

item.title: Bitcoin 79K, highest since January, after breaking out above the post-October high resistance. And zero 10am slams since Jane Street got busted for crypto market manipulation - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1rbEdJeXBFZzdTVWZKWDJBTlgyUGMyWWY5X2dSbG9ZR25WeXZsQlI4bkI5dlJNcmJ0eGM5RFV6a1pteFMyLTJ3WnRjSU5yTzl5cVAyRGNFbkNPVnJPY2dj?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin 79K, highest since January, af…

item.title: Tax-free bitcoin is back: How UK investors can avoid paying duty on crypto investments once more
item.description: Stratiphy will offer access to three ETNs provided by 21Shares: those covering bitcoin, ether and one combining BTC and gold.

item.title: Binance.US cuts spot trading fees to near zero in push to undercut rivals
item.description: The exchange set maker fees at 0% and taker fees at 0.02% across all pairs, extending near-zero pricing to all users with no volume tiers or subscription requirements.

item.title: #BTC Bitcoin continues to enjoy upside but the levels remain the same The 21-week EMA is still resistance until proven otherwise and the Double Bottom formation top could always become a post-breakout retesting zone in the event of rejection from the EMA - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5OeGl6X184VFpSYmoyU0NScVNYX0pFRXN2bXlQcXdvcVNkRm8tTDJWNGlSX09qSmtNRjdxVUs3WExXWTdqT2RTbllZeUFGb1pyQkxFTlF2NzRwQzc3Mzd2ampR?oc=5" target="_blank">#BTC Bitcoin continues to enjoy up…

item.title: Aave deposits fall by $15B as Kelp exploit sparks flight from DeFi lender
item.description: Aave’s supplied balance has tanked since the Kelp DAO bridge exploit, as users pull funds amid uncertainty over how much of the rsETH-linked shortfall the protocol will ultimately absorb.

item.title: Robinhood Ventures Invests $75 Million in OpenAI, Offering Retail Traders Exposure
item.description: Robinhood’s publicly-traded fund aims to give retail investors exposure to AI startups like OpenAI, without accreditation requirements.
